name: SweetCrust Bakery Portal
summary: A comprehensive customer portal for SweetCrust Bakery enabling online orders, delivery tracking, and customer relationship management.
description: Designed and built a full-featured portal using Power Apps Canvas and Dataverse, integrating with Power Automate for order processing workflows.
outcomes: Automated order processing, reducing manual data entry by 80%
Real-time delivery tracking visible to customers

name: Power Apps Incident Management
techStack: Model-Driven Apps, Dataverse, Power Automate, Power BI
summary: Enterprise incident management system built on Dynamics 365 platform for a mining company with real-time dashboards and automated escalations.
description: A model-driven application supporting incident tracking, escalation workflows, and compliance reporting across multiple departments.
outcomes: Real-time visibility across all operational areas

name: Power BI Sales Analytics
techStack: Power BI, Power Query, DAX, Excel
summary: Advanced analytics dashboard providing sales leadership with real-time insights into pipeline, forecast, and revenue metrics.
description: Multi-dimensional reporting solution with drill-through capabilities, role-level security, and automated refresh workflows.
outcomes: Reduced reporting time from 2 days to instant dashboards
Enabled data-driven decision making at all levels

name: Azure API & Logic Apps Integration
techStack: Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Azure Service Bus, C#
summary: Microservices architecture for integrating legacy ERP systems with modern cloud applications using Azure serverless components.
description: Scalable API layer built on Azure Functions with event-driven orchestration via Logic Apps and Service Bus for reliable message processing.
outcomes: Reduced integration costs by 40% through serverless architecture
Enabled real-time data sync across 5+ enterprise systems
